chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2598 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge(s) Priority 1. For hearing of CMA No.11618/2020 (stay) 2. For hearing of main case. 13-05-2025 Mr. Muhammad Adil Saeed, advocate for petitioners Mr. Naeem Ahmed, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Deputy Attorney General along with Mr. Muhammad Akbar Khan, Assistant Attorney General It is jointly submitted that this petition is covered by a judgment in the case of M/s Millennium Mall Management Co. v. Pakistan and others reported as SBLR 2024 Sindh 1059, hence, this petition may be disposed of on the same reasons and upon the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Ayaz Gul
